name: Loan for Any Purpose
description_short: Glendale, CA - Loan for Any Purpose storefront at 253 S Brand Blvd offers quick payday and title loans for local residents.
description_long:
Loan for Any Purpose is located at 253 S Brand Blvd, Suite 100 in Glendale, CA. This standalone storefront serves the Glendale community with extended hours: Monday through Friday from 7 AM to 8 PM, and weekends from 9 AM to 6 PM, providing convenient access for working residents and those with flexible schedules.

At this Glendale location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other quick-access lending products designed for immediate financial needs. The knowledgeable staff can walk you through the application process and answer questions about available options. Reach the Glendale office at +1 747-281-4766 to discuss your needs or verify current terms.

If you're a Glendale resident facing an unexpected expense, bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and banking information to your appointment. The application process is straightforward and designed to be completed quickly. Loan for Any Purpose focuses on accessibility for residents who need fast funding solutions.
address: 253 S Brand Blvd Suite 100, Glendale, CA 91204

company_info.headquarters: 253 S Brand Blvd Suite 100, Glendale, CA 91204

pros: Offers same-day loan approval and funding for urgent cash needs
Accepts all credit types including bad credit borrowers, no credit score minimum stated
Wide loan amount range from $250 to $50,000 depending on product type
Extended operating hours (7am–8pm weekdays, 9am–6pm weekends) including Sundays
Multiple loan product types to fit different borrowing scenarios and amounts
Soft credit inquiry that does not affect FICO score
Physical storefront location allows in-person application and service
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed on website—critical pricing information hidden
Company explicitly disclaims products are short-term solutions and recommends credit counseling for borrowers with credit difficulties, implying high costs
Terms and rates vary significantly by state and individual applicant with no transparency on what determines final offer
Loan qualification is not guaranteed; advertised maximum amounts may not be approved for individual applicants
Minimal disclosures suggest typical emergency lending structure with potentially predatory terms
best_for: Borrowers with poor or no credit history needing immediate cash ($250–$1,000)
Vehicle owners needing larger sums who can use car title as collateral
Consumers requiring same-day or next-day funding for emergency expenses
Applicants wanting to apply in person at a physical location rather than online only
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for borrowers facing immediate cash shortfalls who cannot access traditional credit and have collateral (vehicle title) or are willing to accept short-term loan terms. The critical caveat is that pricing—APR, fees, and actual terms—is completely absent from their website, which is typical of emergency lenders operating in this space and suggests consumers should expect high costs and should only use these products for genuine emergencies, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Same-day unsecured loans with fast approval
Title loans secured by vehicle title (up to $50,000)
Online loan applications with verification option
meta_description: Glendale, CA - Loan for Any Purpose at 253 S Brand Blvd. Fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
